caption: HEADLINER · PUBLISHED
title: advance-conv-benchmarks
desc: Every convolution variant, counted and raced: FLOPs and parameters across PyTorch and TensorFlow, packaged as a documented Python library anyone can pip install.

caption: COMPANION
title: Types_of_Convolutions
desc: The convolution zoo: depthwise, dilated, transposed, separable. Explained and implemented, one notebook at a time.

caption: VISION
title: Custom Aruco 6-DOF tracking
desc: Millimeter-level marker pose estimation with custom calibration and DLT, tuned until it held 20+ FPS on real robot hardware. The same stack that went to RoboCup.

caption: QUANT
title: Option pricing engine
desc: Black-Scholes and Monte Carlo pricing with full Greeks, risk estimation, and a simulation engine that chews through thousands of paths with automated rebalancing.

caption: DETECTION
title: Ensemble object detection
desc: YOLOv8 + ResNet50 + MobileNet-SSD ensembles, validated to 98%+ accuracy, deployed with sub-second response.

caption: RESEARCH TOOLING
title: rootml-bridge
desc: A Python bridge wiring modern ML into CERN's ROOT analysis framework. Particle physics meets PyTorch.

caption: OFF PANEL · FUN
title: Treble
desc: A desktop music player handling 500+ tracks on SQLite + PyGame, with sub-second queries. Casper-approved.

caption: AGENTIC AI · RAG
title: Scientific RAG
desc: Retrieval-augmented generation over scientific literature: embed the corpus, search it by meaning, and let an LLM answer with grounded, cited context instead of guesses.

caption: RESEARCH · ML4Sci / GSoC
title: Particle track reconstruction
desc: Deep learning that turns raw detector hits into particle trajectories, an ML4Sci / Google Summer of Code project at the seam of physics and ML.

caption: EDGE · QUANTIZATION
title: Edge model quantization
desc: Squeezing networks down for the edge: INT8 quantization through Intel Neural Compressor and ONNX, trading size and latency for as little accuracy as it can.

caption: VISION · DEPTH
title: ZED depth-cam pose extraction
desc: Pulling 3D pose straight from a ZED stereo depth stream: position and orientation out of the point cloud, ready to feed a robot.
